value_source: Sanitized hosted staging attestation JSON packet.

value_source: Base64 encoded hosted staging attestation JSON packet.
purpose: Safer GitHub Actions transport for the same external packet.
blocker_if_missing: Workflow needs JSON fallback or cannot load attestation.

value_source: Hosted staging control-plane Postgres connection string.
purpose: Runs control-plane migrations, auth, tenant routing, and live CI proof.
blocker_if_missing: Hosted live CI and tenant-control proof cannot run.

value_source: Hosted staging admin connection string that can create/drop tenant DBs.
purpose: Runs provisioning, restore, and DB-per-tenant isolation checks.
blocker_if_missing: Tenant isolation and restore drill remain unproven.

purpose: Allows tenant provisioning commands to target the staging database host.
blocker_if_missing: Tenant provisioning cannot be proven in hosted staging.

purpose: Encrypts tenant database credentials before storage.
